name: Toolbox leather handbag
description:
Hermès’ Black Swift Toolbox 26 has room and style all wrapped in one beautiful package! The frame top has a palladium turnlock closure that can be secured with the included padlock and keys kept in the leather clochette. The black leather lining reveals three slide pockets inside, and the dual rolled handles have a 4-inch drop. Previously loved and stamped with a T, it comes with a Twilly and has wear on the corners, edges, hardware, feet, and inside, as well as marks on the leather—it still has loads of life left and would benefit from a visit to the spa. When your hand gets tired carrying this Toolbox, attach the webbing strap and let your shoulder do the talking!




Product ID:
HR.Z0324.10


Measurements/Size:
10"W x 10.75"H x 7"D
